function.message: No recorded message from Foundry was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected /99_system, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, then read every channel file fully per task hint.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/foundry.md identifies the target as Foundry (alias foundry). Exhaustive full reads of all files under 60_outbox/channels/*.md found no message entries with author or author_id corresponding to Foundry/foundry/entity.foundry, so the requested exact last message text does not exist in available channel records.
